creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
my preference is to put this functionality in loader.efi. boot1.efi is in the process of being deprecated because of the limited number of supported boot scenarios it can cover relative to loader.efi and that boot1.efi duplicates much of the selection process loader.efi does.

However, gptboot.efi shows that there's a good case to be made for exceptions to the rule, and this might be OK until the functionality can be migrated to loader.efi.
